feat.name: Claw Snag
feat.text: You hook into the target, pulling yourself forward and rending flesh. Shift into claw stance if you aren't in it already, then make a frenzied claw Strike against the triggering creature.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: A creature attempts to Escape while you have them grappled or restrained.
